nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: Anna Dorothea was born in 1644, in Singhofen, Singhofen, Unterlahnkreis, Hesse-Nassau, Prussia, Germany. She married Johan Emrich Neidhofer in 1665, in Singhofen, Singhofen, Unterlahnkreis, Hesse-Nassau, Prussia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Johan Emrich Neidhofer в 1665 г. в местности сингхофен, сингхофен, унтирлахнкрис, хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.
